reason:
Agent responded with LLM Provider Error instead of answering the math question
  Bugs found:
    - Agent failed to respond to "Hello! What is 2+2?" with an answer mentioning "4". Instead, it returned two "LLM Provider Error" messages indicating the Claude API was overloaded (repeated 529 errors). The error message states: "API Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors. The API is at capacity — this is usually temporary. Try again in a moment. If it persists, check https://status.claude.com." The agent worked for 29 seconds before failing.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with home view showing two agents in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260716-183802-aa63" agent in sidebar (ref=e55) — Agent detail page loaded, agent status displayed as "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" (acceptable per requirements)

Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" to the input field (ref=e172) and clicked send button (ref=e317) — Message successfully sent, new session "Basic Math Question Session" created, agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response using activity indicator polling — Wait completed after agent finished processing (29 seconds elapsed)

Verified response mentions "4" — FAILED: Response contained two "LLM Provider Error" messages instead of a math answer. The errors indicate API capacity issues (529 Overloaded errors) from the external Claude LLM provider, not a response mentioning "4"
bugs: Agent failed to respond to "Hello! What is 2+2?" with an answer mentioning "4". Instead, it returned two "LLM Provider Error" messages indicating the Claude API was overloaded (repeated 529 errors). The error message states: "API Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors. The API is at capacity — this is usually temporary. Try again in a moment. If it persists, check https://status.claude.com." The agent worked for 29 seconds before failing.
